title: Google TPU 8t and 8i is here..
summary: Google released TPU 8t and 8i accelerators, specialized ASIC chips for training and inference respectively, deployed via Virgo Network for high throughput serving. The video compares these ASICs to NVIDIA GPUs and discusses how scaling strategies affect token economics and LLM serving costs.
